entry.title: wishfull dreaming
entry.summary:
Author: unissym

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,527Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: “Hey, I heard we are going to be roommates. I’m Eddie Diaz” “I’m Evan Buckley” The boy said in reply. He was a few inches taller than him, and had such bright blue eyes, Eddie thought he could get lost in them. “So why did you leave Hershey?” He asked, trying to make some small talk. “Uhm, my brother, Daniel, he studied here”   or a dead poets society retelling where no one dies and they have a happy ending (eventually).

entry.title: Soul of Water
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 188,895Chapters: 23/26Kudos: 193

Summary: Buck made a friend as a child that would stay with him from that day on. That friend just so happened to be a spirited little water elemental. A promise has kept their bond a secret his entire life, but now that Buck is older, and a very perceptive Eddie Diaz has entered the picture, keeping his secret might not be as easy, or necessary, as he thought. Follow Buck as he learns more about his bond and abilities, all while dragging an unaware Eddie and Chris along for the ride.

entry.title: like you've had too much wine...
entry.summary:
Author: BekahRose

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,723Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: He's never seen Maddie drunk before. In fact, the most he's ever seen her drink have been a couple of sips of wine when the team have gotten together for dinner. Buck on the other hand… He turns his head to see Buck still curled on his side, giggling and watching Eddie and Maddie. -OR- Eddie arrives at Buck's place, with the gift of pizza, following Buck's reassurance to Maddie that they've always had a family that was there for them...

entry.title: i’d die without you
entry.summary:
Author: yeonnamdays

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,134Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: “Why didn’t they kill me?” Eddie presses. Buck looks down at his lap to avoid Eddie’s piercing gaze, but there’s no use. Giving Eddie what he wants is engraved into Buck’s very DNA. “What did you do?” “I offered to stay,” Buck blurts out. Eddie freezes. “You - what?” “I-I offered to stay and pretend to be her son if she let you go.”Or, in a New Mexico hospital, Eddie finds out that Buck sacrificed himself for him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Worst Moment of Evan Buck Buckley's life.
entry.summary:
Author: HeartWizard90

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,436Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Eddie’s lips parted for them to melt together. A buzz thrummed under Buck’s skin as his hand pulled at Eddie’s side, they did this as they did everything - together. Oh, Buck was screwed. This was bad, this was really bad. He pushed Eddie away, not far but away. Eddie leaned back in (for a second round of the worst moment of Buck’s life?!?) but Buck yelped, running out of the kitchen. - OR; Buck crashes the Han household in panic to the upset of a tired Maddie, Eddie Diaz is bad at communicating what a DATE is, and Buck is his typical oblivious self to Eddie's gay-ness.

entry.title: on the far shore of this calamity
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,017Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 314

Summary: “On the other side of this,” Eddie whispers. “Maybe we can try it.”“Hm, okay,” Buck hums, apparently awake, but barely. “What are we tryin’?”“I know now isn’t the right time. I’m not - - we’re not ready. But this next bit isn’t going to be pretty. It’s going to be hard. And I need you to know, so you have something to hold on to. So that I don’t forget what it feels like. What it felt like. We could - - we could try.” Or, after the kidnapping, Buck goes through it. Eddie goes through it with him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: born in fire (ash)
entry.summary:
Author: sunwoosbestie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,738Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: In Los Angeles, spontaneous human combustion isn’t just a myth. Sometimes people ignite without warning, transforming into destructive creatures known as Infernals. When that happens, specialized fire brigades are sent in to contain the blaze—and put the victims to rest. Fire Soldier Ariadne Lee transfers to Fire Station 118 hoping to leave her past behind. Instead she finds another city dealing with impossible fires, a conspiracy quietly manufacturing combustion events, and one very persistent firefighter named Evan Buckley who refuses to stop getting on her nerves. As the number of Infernal incidents rises and whispers of a shadowy organization begin to surface, the 118 discovers that some fires aren’t accidents. And sometimes you need to burn before you can rise.

entry.title: my first kiss went a little like this
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,056Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 196

Summary: "Eddie?" Shannon picks up on the fourth ring. "Everything okay?" "I kissed a man," he says. The silence on the other end stretches for nine thousand years. Eddie can hear Shannon breathing. He can hear his own heartbeat slamming against his ribs. He stares at the apartment building through his windshield, at the lit window on the fourth floor that might belong to E. Buckley, and waits for his ex-wife to say literally anything at all. "You what?" "I kissed a man, Shannon. Just now. I was delivering food and he opened the door and I just— I kissed him. On the mouth. And I don't know why." Another silence. Then a sound Eddie recognizes with dawning horror as Shannon trying very, very hard to suppress a laugh. "Shannon." "I'm processing." "You're laughing." "I'm processing." She fails spectacularly. "I'm sorry, I just— you kissed a man? Edmundo Diaz? The same Edmundo Diaz who wouldn't watch Brokeback Mountain with me because it made him 'uncomfortable'?" "It did make me uncomfortable!" "Yeah, Eddie, I'm starting to understand why." Or,Being kissed by your Uber Eats delivery driver? Worse things have happened.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: the aftermath
entry.summary:
Author: goforeddie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,043Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 28

Summary: “I’m sorry,” Eddie says, putting the glass of water down. He’s shaking, too, Buck can’t help but notice. Buck wants to reach out, but he literally cannot move, and he lets Eddie step away, walking back to his chair and he falls back on it. “Sorry,” he says again, his voice barely a breath. Buck shakes his head, opening his mouth to say something but nothing comes out. What can he say, really? Sorry, Eds, I thought you were my kidnapper standing over me! So he sighs, head going down to his chest and he winces, both from the pain and from bringing that hurt look on his best friend’s face. “I-I got startled,” he says, voice creaking as he speaks. Eddie waves him off, “It’s-It’s okay,” stutters, fidgeting with his fingers. “I got close,” he says, gesturing to him, the bed and the glass of water on the table. A moment of silence passes OR : Buck struggles with the aftermath of the kidnapping.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: i'm always, forever, runnin' back to you
entry.summary:
Author: peachicedtea73

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,950Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: “Relation?” Buck spoke before he could think. “Boyfriend.” The woman gave him a nod, and he climbed in. He could have said coworker. He could have said friend. At the same time, he knew Eddie wouldn’t have minded, anyway....Buck and Eddie had been dating for a week, but neither of them were content with taking things slow. When Eddie almost dies on a call, it forces both of them to confront what they truly want.

entry.title: Kisses on repeat
entry.summary:
Author: Peaceandflowers

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,188Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 55

Summary: "Eddie knows something is going on. He can feel it—there’s something different in the air, Buck is acting a little strange, and every time he walks into a conversation at the station, everyone goes quiet. But he decides to ignore it; maybe he’s overthinking a bit and it’s all in his head.Until little things start happening between Buck and him that make him think maybe he isn’t completely wrong." Or “five times Buck accidentally kissed Eddie… and one time Eddie kissed him back.”

entry.title: It’s the worst thing about me (and it’s always around)
entry.summary:
Author: lonesomeday

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,540Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 13

Summary: It starts with aches and pains that Eddie tells himself are nothing—just aging and occupational hazard. But it’s not nothing. And (un)fortunately for Eddie, being married to Evan Buckley means it won’t be downplayed. NOTE: This entire story is written, and will be updated and completed by the next new episode. Please enjoy!

entry.title: Kidnapped: The Place I Come Back To
entry.summary:
Author: Pastel Moon (PastelVA)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,992Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 41

Summary: After Buck is kidnapped by a man who blames him for an old loss, he makes it out alive, but not unchanged. Recovery comes in fragments: sleepless nights, trembling hands, grief that never quite learned how to leave, and the unbearable humiliation of needing to be held together by someone else. So he goes where he can still breathe. He goes to Eddie. Under Eddie’s roof, in the quiet shape of domesticity and the shadow of everything they have already lost, Buck begins to understand that survival is only the first half of the story. The second half is softer, but more frightening. And maybe, at last, a kind of coming home.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: "And I didn't know until the fucking Oscars!"
entry.summary:
Author: littlemissaddy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,684Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 30
